parameters.subject: 🎉 Congratulations! You've been upgraded to {{ $json.newTier }}
parameters.html:
Congratulations, {{ $json.partnerName }}!

You've been upgraded from {{ $json.oldTier }} to {{ $json.newTier }} in the ProLnk Partner Network.

Your new benefits:

    {{ $json.newBenefitsHtml }}

Your new commission rate is {{ $json.newCommissionRate }}%.

Keep up the great work! You're now {{ $json.referralsToNextTier }} referrals away from {{ $json.nextTier }}.

View Your Dashboard

parameters.subject: Partner tier upgrade: {{ $json.partnerName }} → {{ $json.newTier }}
You're {{ $json.referralsToNextTier }} referrals from {{ $json.nextTier }} — here's how
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.partnerName }},

You've been at {{ $json.newTier }} for a week now. Here's a quick tip to reach {{ $json.nextTier }}:

1. Share your referral link with 3 new homeowners this week
2. Follow up on any pending leads within 24 hours
3. Complete your profile to rank higher in the partner directory

Your referral link: {{ $json.referralUrl }}

— ProLnk Team

meta.description: Fires when a partner's tier is upgraded. Sends congratulations email + admin notification immediately, then a next-tier nudge 7 days later.
